title: Croatian Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe combining Croatian ingredients with a citrusy twist.

ingredients.name: Stir-fry vegetables
ingredients.notes: mix of bell peppers, carrots, and onions

instructions: Heat the fries oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Croatian sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Croatian paprika, citrusy lemon juice, and gooey honey.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and sausage, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
